text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: During a dance lesson with Smart Falcon...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: One, two, three... One, two, three...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: And... spin!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Squeak!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ehehe! ♪ Mastering your dance routines is
fundamental for any Umadol! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But I'm not just aiming for the baseline—I want to
be the top Umadol in the world!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: The real dance lesson starts now!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Look, the choreography is all set in stone for
each song and position, right?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But people expect something extra from a top
Umadol.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
On top of dancing the same choreography as
everyone else, I need to show off my unique
charm.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I wanna come up with a special pose that'll get
everyone's hearts pounding...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So I want your opinion. How can I bring out my
unique charm?
choice_data_list: There's nothing to do but practice.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: What?! It's just a matter of practice?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You mean... true cuteness is something that shines
through even if I'm doing the same pose?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I thought that the only way to have unique appeal
was by doing something different from everyone
else.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
But I guess there are other ways to look at it!
Thanks, Trainer! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
All right! I'll practice more than anyone else and
become a top Umadol! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, Smart Falcon devotes herself even
more to her lessons.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Yeah! I knew it!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I have to do everything I can to polish my special
appeal...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
So I can show my unique charm to all of the fans
watching me perform!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
On that note... I'd like to know. Do you think I'm
cute?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Of course! You're one of my precious fans, after
all! ♪

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Don't hold back. Just take your time... and join
me for my lesson! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After that, we come up with a special pose for
Smart Falcon.
